Name: LuigiNPC
Notes: A non-playable variant of Luigi that can be talked to. This object will only appear under certain conditions, which is determined by the value of Obj_arg0. This can be bypassed by using SW_APPEAR / SW_SLEEP.

Obj_arg0.Name: Behavior
Obj_arg0.Description: The animation/behavior to be used. If the object is called LuigiEvent, 2 will be added to the value. For any value greater than 0, the object will only appear under certain conditions, unless bypassed with SW_APPEAR / SW_SLEEP.

Values.Notes: Stuck to a wall, then Normal (Honeyhive)

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

SW_A.Description: Jumps up when this switch is activated.

SW_B.Description: Activated if Luigi exists in the current stage.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.

Message.Description: The text message ID to be used. Needs to be specified in the zone's text file.
